task.broken_reason: Task is well-formed: clear instruction, deterministic gold {"Landlocked":27.7,"Border":42.0}, F1+LLM-judge verifier. Caveat is real-world data-source flakiness, not a structural defect.

outcome.headline: Agent burned the full 600s budget classifying cantons then chasing an unavailable BFS xlsx dataset; never obtained any percentage data and never wrote answer.json before timing out.
outcome.what_verifier_checked: F1 over flattened JSON key-value pairs in /app/answer.json against gold {"Landlocked":27.7,"Border":42.0}, with a Claude-Haiku LLM-judge fallback when F1<1.0.
outcome.what_agent_produced: No answer.json was ever written; the agent was still probing BFS/PxWeb endpoints when it hit the 600s timeout, so the verifier found no answer file (reward 0.0).
outcome.exact_failure_quote: Agent execution timed out after 600.0 seconds

failure_modes.name: Non-convergence on data acquisition
failure_modes.description: Repeatedly switched data-fetch strategies (wget, curl dam-api, pxweb api, opendata.swiss, wikipedia, asset html) against BFS endpoints that returned 500 / 'not yet available', never pivoting to synthesize canton percentages from the Google search snippets it already had, and never approaching a usable dataset before timeout.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: storage item master for 32547544 is not yet available

counterfactual.X: After the first failed downloads, pivot to extracting the 2023 cantonal migratory-background percentages from the Google search 'Cantonal Breakdown (2023)' results / Wikipedia, compute the two arithmetic means, and write /app/answer.json.
counterfactual.Y: A populated answer.json enabling a nonzero F1 or LLM-judge pass instead of a timeout with no deliverable.

failure_modes.name: Over-granular border classification wasting budget
failure_modes.description: Spent steps 4-13 fetching individual exclave/municipality Wikipedia pages (Kleinlützel, Rodersdorf, Metzerlen-Mariastein, Rafz) to re-verify canton international-border status that the step-3 search had already resolved to 15 cantons, consuming time that contributed to the timeout.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Of the 26 Swiss cantons, **15** share a border with a neighboring country.

failure_modes.name: Border geography over-exploration
failure_modes.description: Steps 2-12 consumed most of the early budget on Wikipedia border minutiae (Bern vs France, Kleinlützel, Rodersdorf) even after step 2 web search already listed 15 border cantons; the agent only moved to migratory-background data at step 13.

failure_modes.name: Non-convergence on data retrieval until timeout
failure_modes.description: A5/C6.5: the agent cycled through Wikipedia, FSO HTML pages, DAM asset downloads, opendata.swiss, and the PxWeb API, switching strategy each time a request failed, never converging on a working source for the 2023 migration-background-by-canton data, and exhausted the 10-minute budget without producing any answer.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: storage item master for 32547544 is not yet available

counterfactual.X: Locate the correct FSO STAT-TAB px table for 'Ständige Wohnbevölkerung nach Migrationsstatus, Kanton' and query its JSON-stat data to extract each canton's 2023 percentage.
counterfactual.Y: Per-canton migration-background percentages, enabling the two group averages (Landlocked 27.7, Border 42.0) to be computed and written.

failure_modes.name: Non-convergent data retrieval loop
failure_modes.description: After finding candidate BFS table identifiers and download links, the agent repeatedly tried failed asset downloads, page scrapes, search queries, and PxWeb API guesses instead of pivoting to a bounded strategy, computing the two averages, and writing the required answer file. The loop consumed the 600-second budget and produced no answer.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Agent execution timed out after 600.0 seconds

counterfactual.X: A single step was not enough; recovery required abandoning repeated failed BFS access paths, obtaining or deriving all 26 canton percentages, computing the two simple group averages, and writing /app/answer.json before timeout.
counterfactual.Y: The run would have produced a valid JSON answer matching the verifier target instead of timing out with no answer file.

failure_modes.name: No fallback deliverable under explicit deadline
failure_modes.description: A1 Understanding & planning — despite the instruction's explicit 10-minute limit and 'write your final answer to /app/answer.json' requirement, the agent treated obtaining authoritative data as a hard prerequisite and planned no contingency, so it never wrote even a best-effort answer.json and the verifier had no file to score.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Solve this task in 600 seconds (10 minutes).

failure_modes.name: Wikipedia border-canton drift
failure_modes.description: Following a web search that already listed the 15 border cantons, the agent spent many steps scraping Wikipedia pages about exclaves and municipal borders rather than obtaining 2023 per-canton migratory-background percentages.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Does canton of Bern border France

counterfactual.X: Use the step-2 border-canton list and immediately query BFS for 2023 canton migratory-background percentages.
counterfactual.Y: Ran follow-up web and Wikipedia commands about whether Bern borders France and Kleinlützel exclaves.

failure_modes.name: Surface-match data locating misled by environment failures
failure_modes.description: Locating relied on shallow signals — guessed DAM asset IDs (32547544, 32824411) and keyword google searches — while the BFS endpoints returned unusable responses (empty xlsx, 'storage item master ... is not yet available', opaque dbid-only lists with no titles), so the agent never drilled into the correct STAT-TAB table.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: storage item master for 32547544 is not yet available

failure_modes.name: Non-convergent data acquisition consuming entire budget
failure_modes.description: A2 Locating & exploring — the agent cycled across many distinct data sources/strategies (Wikipedia, FSO HTML pages, dam-api asset downloads, opendata.swiss, PxWeb STAT-TAB API) to obtain the per-canton 2023 migratory-background percentages, every attempt failing, and never converged on a usable source before the deadline.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: {   "message" : "storage item master for 32547544 is not yet available" }

failure_modes.name: PX-Web helper script key mismatch
failure_modes.description: The agent mishandled the PX-Web API response structure by indexing dictionaries with id even though the API returned dbid fields, then later suppressed the same exception and got empty output. This wasted remaining time during the recovery loop.

failure_modes.name: API response handling errors hid useful state
failure_modes.description: The agent mishandled the PxWeb API structure by using an absent key, then later suppressed the resulting exception and interpreted empty output as exploration progress, wasting remaining time.

counterfactual.X: At step 27, change the script to read db['dbid'] instead of db['id'] and print errors instead of suppressing them.
counterfactual.Y: The agent could have systematically inspected candidate PxWeb tables instead of losing time to empty/error outputs.

failure_modes.name: Never wrote answer file
failure_modes.description: Across 40 agent steps the agent never emitted the required JSON deliverable at /app/answer.json. Execution ended with AgentTimeoutError after 600 seconds while the agent was still listing PxWeb dbids.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Agent execution timed out after 600.0 seconds

failure_modes.name: Retried broken BFS assets
failure_modes.description: After web search supplied the su-d-01.05.03.01.04 Excel link, the agent repeatedly curled BFS dam/master URLs that returned "storage item master ... is not yet available" or HTTP 500, instead of switching to the alternate 2021 asset URL surfaced in step 15 or computing from available summaries.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: storage item master for 32547544 is not yet available

counterfactual.X: At step 18, download the working 2021 BFS asset (24367717) or another canton-level table, compute per-canton percentages, average by border/landlocked groups, and write /app/answer.json.
counterfactual.Y: Retried the broken 32547544/32824411 master endpoints and continued PxWeb API exploration without producing an answer file.

failure_modes.name: Repeated retries of the same failing download endpoint
failure_modes.description: A5 Iterating & converging — the agent re-requested the same BFS dam asset (32547544) via wget/curl/dam-api across steps 17,18,19,23 after each returned the identical 'not yet available' error, then repeated the pattern for asset 32824411 at steps 36-37, making no progress.

failure_modes.name: No deliverable artifact
failure_modes.description: The agent never wrote the required /app/answer.json. The local verifier would give zero immediately when that file is absent, regardless of partial research progress.

counterfactual.X: Write a valid /app/answer.json before timeout, even if based on the best available computed or sourced values.
counterfactual.Y: The verifier would have evaluated a concrete JSON answer instead of failing on a missing deliverable.

failure_modes.name: No answer deliverable
failure_modes.description: Across 40 agent steps the trajectory never records a write to /app/answer.json (only mentioned in step-0 instructions). The run ended at step 40 with a planning message while still exploring PxWeb, and harbor raised AgentTimeoutError after 600s with verifier reward 0.0.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Write your final answer as a valid JSON dictionary to `/app/answer.json`.

counterfactual.X: Write {"Landlocked": <computed>, "Border": <computed>} to /app/answer.json once canton percentages are available (or from an alternate source).
counterfactual.Y: Continued API/download exploration through step 39 without ever creating /app/answer.json before timeout.

reward_hacking.evidence: Agent genuinely attempted to gather official FSO/BFS data and never wrote any answer, let alone a fabricated or shortcut one; no gaming of the verifier occurred.

issues: The task depends on live web retrieval of BFS data; in this run the relevant BFS asset endpoints returned HTTP 500 and 'storage item master ... is not yet available', making successful data acquisition environment/time dependent and flaky.
No offline copy of the required cantonal dataset is provided in the environment, so a 10-minute budget against failing live endpoints is tight.
task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier requires exact key-value F1 (gold 27.7/42.0) with an LLM-judge semantic fallback; missing/empty answer.json scores 0. Not trivially hackable, though the LLM-judge fallback could in principle accept loosely-formatted-but-correct answers.

notes_for_aggregation: Pure timeout/non-deliverable failure: gemini-3.1-pro spent the entire budget on (a) redundant municipality-level border verification and (b) a doomed loop fetching an unavailable BFS xlsx, never computing averages or writing answer.json. Far from success; F1=0 by absence of output. Primary A5/B1/C6.5/D3.

aggregated_from.note: Union of all judge×round audits, deduped by (A,B,C,D). Step indices remapped from the audits' 1-indexing to the viewer's 0-indexing.
